brand.name: Aegoria
brand.tagline: One planet. Every domain. Data you can trust.

signatureColour.name: Auralis
signatureColour.story: A living cyan-jade — the colour of data becoming knowledge. Auralis is Aegoria's invented signature hue: cool enough to read as trustworthy and clinical, alive enough to feel like signal moving through a planetary nervous system.

gradient.veil: radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 20% -10%, rgba(22,224,196,0.10), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(1000px 500px at 100% 0%, rgba(123,97,255,0.10), transparent 55%)
